[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101001011 5
1 011101000 4
2 001111111 7
3 000001011 3
4 010110100 4
5 010101111 6
6 011001110 5
7 001010010 3

01 10 000000000 a
12 21 010100100 3
23 32 010001110 4
34 43 001000010 2
45 54 001000010 2
56 65 001001000 2
67 76 001101000 3
70 07 000001011 3 match 3

02 20 000001011 3 match 3
13 31 010000100 2
24 42 000000010 1
35 53 001001010 3
46 64 001000000 1
57 75 001001011 4
60 06 000001000 1
71 17 000110100 3

03 30 000001010 2
14 41 000010000 1
25 52 000001011 3 match 3
36 63 011001000 3
47 74 001010010 3 match 7
50 05 000001011 3 match 3
61 16 010100000 2
72 27 000101111 5

04 40 000000010 1
15 51 000000000 a
26 62 010101000 3
37 73 001001110 4
